Inserted clause (4) — special provision for the advancement of socially and educationally backward classes, SCs and STs.
Inserted clause (5) — reservation in educational institutions, including private unaided ones.
Inserted clause (6) — up to 10% reservation for economically weaker sections.

15.learn_note: Amended thrice — clauses (4)–(6) were added by the 1st, 93rd and 103rd Amendments. See Amendment history under Browse.

amendments.text: Amended by the 77th Amendment (1995) — Protected reservation in promotions for SCs/STs.

16.learn_note: Promotion/reservation clauses (4A)/(4B)/(6) added by later amendments — read the current clauses carefully.

amendments.text: Substituted clause (2) — allowed "reasonable restrictions" on freedom of speech and expression.
Widened clause (2) — restrictions in the interest of the sovereignty and integrity of India.
Omitted sub-clause (1)(f) — the right to acquire, hold and dispose of property.

19.learn_note: The letters run (a)–(e), (g): sub-clause (f) — property — was omitted by the 44th Amendment (1978).

amendments.text: Inserted companion Article 21A — free and compulsory education for children aged 6–14. Article 21 itself is unchanged.

amendments.text: Amended by the 75th Amendment (1994) — Enabled Rent Control Tribunals.
